projectName: Mopani 51% Stake Sale to IRH/Delta Mining
description: Sale of 51% stake in Mopani Copper Mines to International Resources Holdings (IRH) and Delta Mining Consolidated for USD 1.1 billion. Transaction completed in 2024, with ZCCM-IH retaining 49%.
Development of the Konkola Deep Mine to increase copper production capacity from 50,000 to 150,000 tonnes per annum. Includes shaft sinking, underground infrastructure, and processing plant upgrades.
Rehabilitation of the Nchanga Tailings Leach Plant to recover copper from historical tailings deposits. Expected to produce 15,000 tonnes of copper per annum.
Expansion of the Maamba thermal power plant by an additional 150MW to address Zambia's power deficit. Project includes coal supply chain upgrades.
Strategic investment in cobalt and manganese processing to capitalise on global energy transition demand. Includes feasibility studies for a battery precursor materials plant.
Upgrade of the Chambishi copper smelter to increase capacity and reduce sulphur dioxide emissions in compliance with environmental regulations.
